name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 28 May 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have rolled out a revamped version of the Drag and Drop Editor module to help you create highly engaging email-related content for your users."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In addition, we have also made some minor yet significant updates to our dynamic content feature, thereby enhancing the ease of use and accessibility aspects of Marketing Cloud."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, read ahead!! "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"DRAG AND DROP EDITOR ENHANCEMENTS:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"PRE-DESIGNED DRAG AND DROP TEMPLATES","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have introduced a "},{"text":"library catalog","bold":true},{"text":" wherein you can choose your Drag and Drop templates from a wide collection of vivid themes to suit your marketing needs. In this way, you can design well-optimized email content much more quickly by using a preloaded blueprint."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/conteditor29.068J1000000XSv8IAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/conteditor29.068J1000000XSv8IAG.png","name":"conteditor29","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1642,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about designing email content by using such a template, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Drag-and-Drop-Editor","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Drag and Drop Editor","bold":true},{"text":" "}]},{"text":"article. "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"DYNAMIC CONTENT EDITOR ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Initially, users could only manually insert Product Feed tags to generate product recommendations in email content, thus making the overall process quite cumbersome. To circumnavigate this issue, we have introduced a "},{"text":"Product Feed Templates","bold":true},{"text":" drop-down list in the dynamic content editor itself. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This allows you to select multiple product feeds with a few clicks, thereby saving time, and it provides access to a plethora of product templates you might not have initially considered using. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/dyncontent1.068J1000000X8VNIA0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/dyncontent1.068J1000000X8VNIA0.png","name":"dyncontent1","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":810,"width":2820}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about dynamic content creation and the pre-defined templates used for displaying product recommendations, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Dynamic-Content","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Dynamic Content","bold":true}]},{"text":" and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Product-Feed-Templates","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Product Feed Template","bold":true}]},{"text":" articles."}]}]}]
